steps.title: Identify variables
steps.content:
The variable x represents minutes Maria spends running each day, and y represents minutes she spends biking each day.
The given equation is $$x + y = 75$$.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content:
Since the left side adds the minutes for both activities, the constant 75 must be the total minutes spent running and biking each day.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
